name: Ko Olina Lagoon 3
tagline: Year-round protected snorkeling with turtles — the safest, most accessible snorkel on Oahu.
parking: Free public lot for Lagoon 3 (fills by 9am weekends)
bestTime: Arrive by 8am weekends for parking; weekdays are easy. Morning has best visibility
talkStory: Bring your own snorkel gear — no rentals nearby and it saves money. Turtles frequent all four lagoons but Lagoon 3 tends to have the most. The man-made rock barriers keep the water calm 365 days a year, making this the safest snorkel for beginners and kids on the entire island. All lagoons are legally public beaches despite the resort setting.
